siteTitle: SEOPilot — AI-Powered SEO That Fixes Itself
siteDescription: SEOPilot is an AI-powered SEO automation platform that audits websites, detects issues, and fixes them automatically using intelligent agents.

sections.title: AI-Powered SEO: That Fixes Itself
sections.description: SEOPilot deploys intelligent AI agents that crawl your site, detect technical and content issues, and apply fixes automatically. Stop wasting hours on manual audits.

sections.title: Meet Your AI SEO Team
sections.description: Six specialized AI agents work together to audit, analyze, and fix your website's SEO automatically.

features.title: Website Crawler Agent
features.description: Crawls your entire site, maps page structure, extracts metadata, detects broken links, and identifies duplicate pages.

features.title: Technical SEO Agent
features.description: Finds missing meta titles, broken canonicals, slow pages, image issues, sitemap problems, and robots.txt errors.

features.title: Content SEO Agent
features.description: Analyzes keyword opportunities, thin content, heading structure, schema markup gaps, and weak internal linking.

features.title: Auto-Fix Agent
features.description: Generates optimized meta tags, adds schema markup, improves headings, compresses images, and fixes alt tags automatically.

features.title: Performance Agent
features.description: Analyzes Core Web Vitals, page speed, lazy loading, script optimization, and generates performance fixes.

features.title: Monitoring Agent
features.description: Runs weekly SEO scans, tracks ranking improvements, monitors SEO score, and alerts you when issues appear.

sections.title: How SEOPilot Works
sections.description: From URL to optimized site in minutes. Our AI agent pipeline handles everything.

steps.title: Submit Your URL
steps.description: Enter your website URL and SEOPilot begins a comprehensive crawl of every page.

steps.title: AI Agents Analyze
steps.description: Six specialized agents scan technical SEO, content quality, performance, and structure simultaneously.

steps.title: Issues Detected
steps.description: Get a prioritized list of SEO problems with severity ratings and impact scores.

steps.title: Auto-Fix Applied
steps.description: AI generates and applies fixes for meta tags, schema, headings, images, and more.

steps.title: Monitor & Improve
steps.description: Continuous monitoring tracks your SEO health and applies improvements automatically.

sections.title: Your SEO Command Center
sections.description: A powerful dashboard that gives you complete visibility into your website's SEO health, AI agent activity, and improvement history.

sections.title: Works With Your Stack
sections.description: SEOPilot integrates seamlessly with the platforms you already use.

sections.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
sections.description: Start free. Scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

sections.title: Let AI Fix Your SEO While You Sleep
sections.description: SEOPilot's autonomous agents work 24/7, continuously monitoring and improving your website's search performance.

sections.title: Why Teams Choose SEOPilot
sections.description: Built by SEO engineers, powered by AI, trusted by thousands.

reasons.title: Fully Autonomous
reasons.description: AI agents detect and fix issues without human intervention. Set it and forget it.

reasons.title: 99.7% Accuracy
reasons.description: Our detection engine is trained on millions of SEO audits for industry-leading precision.

reasons.title: 10x Faster
reasons.description: What takes an SEO consultant weeks, SEOPilot does in minutes.

reasons.title: Enterprise Secure
reasons.description: SOC 2 compliant, encrypted connections, and read-only access by default.

sections.title: Trusted by SEO Professionals
sections.description: Join thousands of teams who automated their SEO with SEOPilot.

testimonials.quote: SEOPilot found 847 issues on our Shopify store that we missed for months. The auto-fix feature saved us 40+ hours.
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: We manage 200+ client sites. SEOPilot's automation replaced three full-time SEO analysts and improved results.
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.quote: The monitoring agent caught a critical indexing issue at 2 AM that would have cost us thousands in lost traffic.
testimonials.author: Emily Nakamura

sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Everything you need to know about SEOPilot.

questions.question: How does SEOPilot's AI audit work?
questions.answer: SEOPilot deploys six specialized AI agents that crawl your entire website, analyze technical SEO, content quality, performance, and more. Each agent produces structured findings that are prioritized by impact and severity.

questions.question: Can SEOPilot automatically fix issues?
questions.answer: Yes. The Auto-Fix Agent generates optimized meta tags, schema markup, heading structures, alt tags, and more. For supported platforms like Shopify and WordPress, fixes can be applied automatically via API.

questions.question: What platforms does SEOPilot support?
questions.answer: SEOPilot works with Shopify, WordPress, Webflow, custom websites, and any platform accessible via URL. We also integrate with Google Search Console and Google Analytics for deeper insights.

questions.question: Is there a free plan?
questions.answer: Yes! Our Starter plan is completely free and includes monthly SEO audits for one website. Upgrade to Pro for weekly audits, auto-fix, and competitor analysis.

questions.question: How is SEOPilot different from other SEO tools?
questions.answer: Most SEO tools only detect problems. SEOPilot goes further by automatically generating and applying fixes using AI agents. It's like having an autonomous SEO engineer working on your site 24/7.

questions.question: Is my website data secure?
questions.answer: Absolutely. SEOPilot is SOC 2 compliant, uses encrypted connections, and operates with read-only access by default. We never store your website credentials.

sections.title: Ready to Automate Your SEO?
sections.description: Join 10,000+ websites using AI to fix their SEO. Start your free audit in under 60 seconds.
